---
title: "Sarayu Ramnath"
image: sarayu_image.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sarayu-ramnath
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sarayu-26
      target: _blank
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:sramnath@bren.ucsb.edu
---

Marine enthusiast. Badass MC
